title: Casio Deck
settings.notify_on_press.label: Notify on press
settings.notify_on_press.description: Show a desktop notification when a watch button event is received.
settings.helper_command.label: Helper command
settings.helper_command.description: Command that streams normalized watch button events into the bridge service.
settings.scan_command.label: Scan command
settings.scan_command.description: Optional command the dashboard Scan button runs. It should emit scan lines, usually the helper with --scan-only.
settings.watch_model.label: Watch model
settings.watch_model.description: Select the trigger vocabulary the bridge should expect from the helper.
settings.trigger_action_map.label: Advanced trigger action map
settings.trigger_action_map.description: Optional newline or semicolon separated mappings such as lower_right=preset:media_play_pause or finder=command:notify-send Casio.
settings.youtube_channel_url.label: YouTube channel URL
settings.youtube_channel_url.description: LuixBits channel URL shown in the About tab.
settings.explanation_video_url.label: Explanation video URL
settings.explanation_video_url.descripti: Optional future video URL shown in the About tab.
settings.button_a_preset.label: Button A preset
settings.button_a_preset.description: Preset action to run when button A is pressed. Custom command settings still work as fallback.
settings.button_a_command.label: Button A command
settings.button_a_command.description: Shell command to run when button A is pressed. Leave empty to only record the press.
settings.button_b_preset.label: Button B preset
settings.button_b_preset.description: Preset action to run when button B is pressed. Custom command settings still work as fallback.
settings.button_b_command.label: Button B command
settings.button_b_command.description: Shell command to run when button B is pressed. Leave empty to only record the press.
settings.button_c_preset.label: Button C preset
settings.button_c_preset.description: Preset action to run when button C is pressed. Custom command settings still work as fallback.
settings.button_c_command.label: Button C command
settings.button_c_command.description: Shell command to run when button C is pressed. Leave empty to only record the press.
settings.button_d_preset.label: Button D preset
settings.button_d_preset.description: Preset action to run when button D is pressed. Custom command settings still work as fallback.
settings.button_d_command.label: Button D command
settings.button_d_command.description: Shell command to run when button D is pressed. Leave empty to only record the press.
settings.lower_left_preset.label: Lower-left preset
settings.lower_left_preset.description: Preset action to run when the helper reports the watch lower-left trigger.
settings.lower_left_command.label: Lower-left command
settings.lower_left_command.description: Shell command to run when the helper reports the watch lower-left trigger.
settings.lower_right_preset.label: Lower-right preset
settings.lower_right_preset.description: Preset action to run when the helper reports the watch lower-right trigger.
settings.lower_right_command.label: Lower-right command
settings.lower_right_command.description: Shell command to run when the helper reports the watch lower-right trigger.
settings.timeplace_preset.label: TIME&PLACE preset
settings.timeplace_preset.description: Preset action to run when the helper reports the ABL-100WE TIME&PLACE trigger.
settings.timeplace_command.label: TIME&PLACE command
settings.timeplace_command.description: Shell command to run when the helper reports the ABL-100WE TIME&PLACE trigger.
settings.finder_preset.label: Finder preset
settings.finder_preset.description: Preset action to run when the helper reports the watch finder trigger.
settings.finder_command.label: Finder command
settings.finder_command.description: Shell command to run when the helper reports the watch finder trigger.
settings.unknown_preset.label: Unknown trigger preset
settings.unknown_preset.description: Preset action to run when the helper can detect a watch event but cannot identify the exact trigger.
settings.unknown_command.label: Unknown trigger command
settings.unknown_command.description: Shell command to run when the helper reports an unknown trigger.
settings.label.label: Label
settings.label.description: Text shown next to the watch glyph in the bar.
settings.show_label.label: Show label
settings.show_label.description: Show text next to the watch glyph.
settings.show_press_count.label: Show press count
settings.show_press_count.description: Append the number of received button presses to the bar label.
settings.hide_disconnected.label: Hide while disconnected
settings.hide_disconnected.description: Hide the bar widget until the bridge reports a connected watch.
